mapper.sql: id, user_id, device_id, conversation_type, conversation_id, last_sync_seq, last_sync_time, sync_version, create_time, update_time
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO im_sync_cursor ( id, user_id, device_id, conversation_type, conversation_id, last_sync_seq, last_sync_time, version, create_time, update_time ) VALUES ( #{id}, #{userId}, #{deviceId}, #{conversationType}, #{conversationId}, #{lastSyncSeq}, #{lastSyncTime}, #{version}, #{createTime}, #{updateTime} ) ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE last_sync_seq = VALUES(last_sync_seq), last_sync_time = VALUES(last_sync_time), version = version + 1, update_time = VALUES(update_time)

INSERT INTO im_sync_cursor ( id, user_id, device_id, conversation_type, conversation_id, last_sync_seq, last_sync_time, sync_version, create_time, update_time ) VALUES ( #{id}, #{userId}, #{deviceId}, #{conversationType}, #{conversationId}, #{lastSyncSeq}, #{lastSyncTime}, #{syncVersion}, #{createTime}, #{updateTime} ) ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE last_sync_seq = VALUES(last_sync_seq), last_sync_time = VALUES(last_sync_time), sync_version = sync_version + 1, update_time = VALUES(update_time)

INSERT INTO im_sync_cursor ( id, user_id, device_id, conversation_type, conversation_id, last_sync_seq, last_sync_time, sync_version, create_time, update_time ) VALUES
( #{item.id}, #{item.userId}, #{item.deviceId}, #{item.conversationType}, #{item.conversationId}, #{item.lastSyncSeq}, #{item.lastSyncTime}, #{item.syncVersion}, #{item.createTime}, #{item.updateTime} )
ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE last_sync_seq = VALUES(last_sync_seq), last_sync_time = VALUES(last_sync_time), sync_version = sync_version + 1, update_time = VALUES(update_time)
